## beehiiv posts get

Show a post by ID

### Synopsis

Get post

Retreive a single Post belonging to a specific publication

API path: /publications/{publicationId}/posts/{postId}

```
beehiiv posts get <postId> [flags]
```

### Examples

```
beehiiv posts get post_123
beehiiv posts show post_123
```

### Options

```
  -h, --help                help for get
      --query stringArray   Add a repeatable query parameter in key=value form
```
